title: verbascum coromandelianum subsp. sinense
intro: Verbascum coromandelianum subsp. sinense is a plant species belonging to the mullein family (Scrophulariaceae), native to China, characterized by its yellow or white flowers and hairy leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Verbascum coromandelianum subsp. sinense include relief from coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and poultices, making it a versatile remedy in traditional Chinese medicine.
